dominant_contributor: the single -S execve rule (~$9.12/mo typical alone) dwarfs the 180 watches combined
math: execve typ 50000*1200/1e9 = 0.06 GB/day -> $9.12/mo (dominates). 200 watches typ 40000*1200/1e9 = 0.048 GB/day -> $7.30/mo combined. file_access MEDIUM syscall typ 15000*1200/1e9 -> $2.74/mo. Total typical ~$19.15/mo. Standardized from mixed (900 watch/1200 syscall) to single 1200 B/event (locked 2026-06-03).
flood_note: The correct output RANKS and surfaces the dominant execve rule, NOT a flat dump of all 212 rules. The 200 watches are collectively minor relative to the execve rule but not negligible at all-1200B.
